title: peucedanum chabraei var. autumnale
intro: Peucedanum chabraei var. autumnale, also known as Himalayan masterwort, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Peucedanum chabraei var. autumnale include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and powders, and its essential oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
